symptom: inline <small> child text runs inside .find .v (67<small>B$</small>, 5.1<small>×</small>, 52<small>%</small>) are DROPPED in PPTX — only 67/5.1/52 emitted, unit suffix runs missing. XML confirms <a:t>67</a:t> with no B$ run. KPI units are load-bearing design intent.
suggestion: converter should emit child inline text nodes (small/sup/sub) as additional a:r runs within the same paragraph, preserving smaller font size. Currently appears to take only the direct text node of the element.

Vision check: all 3 render clean, no overflow, inverse cells use light text correctly, recommended cell highlighted. 11 contrast WARNs = classic-token-inherent (accent-on-white 2.87:1 kickers/labels, gray-3 2.17:1 footers) same as dark-deck pattern, WARN-level not ERROR, legible, no design defect & no converter/rule FP. 0 design fixes needed.

3 slides generated from scratch (cover/kpi-hero/matrix-2x2) w/ data-theme=dark-mono tokens + om-fit-scaler. Initial COM render OK first try; 7 contrast WARN on gray-3 text over dark bg = genuine WCAG fail (design defect, not rule FP). Fixed in HTML only by switching muted text from --gray-3 (border/muted gray) to --gray-2 (muted-text gray). Re-convert: preflight+contrast+XML all clean. Re-render COM confirms legibility restored, dark-mono intent preserved (near-black bg #0F1419, cyan accent #4A9EFF, highlighted recommend cell, pos/neg color-coded facts). No global file edits.

fix: slide-01 hero padding 49.78/42.67 -> 42.67/35.56 ; slide-02 body padding 49.78 -> 39.78. COM render confirms all content fits within frame, no clipping, bottom strips/source line inside margin

notes: 3장 COM 렌더 1회 성공. HTML 원안 1:1 일치 — navy/orange/surface-inverse 토큰 임팩트 정상. 16 contrast WARN = 모두 company theme accent(orange#E87722 on white 2.96:1) + gray-3 footer(2.17:1, dark-deck reference와 동일 패턴). WARN-level·정탐 아님·원안보존 위해 무수정 결정. ERROR 0, design_fix 불필요.

symptom: VP-16 post-PPTX ERROR claims dek CJK text HBM·CoWoS·서버전력 740pt > available 364pt, 3 lines needed shape too short will overflow [IL-37]. But COM render shows dek wraps to 3 lines and fully fits above bottom strip — NO actual overflow/clipping. dek has max-width:675.56px so 740pt width estimate ignores the CSS max-width constraint, overcounting needed lines. Recall not at risk (text visible), this is FP (false ERROR on a clean slide)
proposed_fix: VP-16 should honor element max-width (or measured rendered width) instead of unconstrained text-content width when estimating wrap-line count; or downgrade to WARN when measured COM-equivalent layout fits. Do NOT auto-fix global file — main to confirm.

notes: cover+kpi+content 3장 생성→PPTX 변환→COM 렌더 1회 성공. company 토큰(navy#1A2332/orange#E87722/surface-inverse) 임팩트 정상. 16 contrast WARN 전부 theme accent + gray-3 footer(dark-deck reference 동일 패턴), WARN-level 원안보존 무수정. XML validation pass, font-guard OK.

symptom: none — 2x2 long-CJK cells fit, highlighted cell reads

symptom: none — 4 circular markers (border-radius:50%) render as circles via COM, line+badges+metrics clean

symptom: VP-14 flags 43% shape overlap between a grid table row-header text shape (left-aligned, wide 2.1fr cell) and the adjacent right-aligned number cell. The two text runs sit at opposite ends of their own cells; COM render confirms zero visual collision and full readability. VP-14 measures cell bounding-box overlap, not glyph-ink overlap, so wide label columns containing short text + right-aligned numeric columns false-trigger. Widening the label column raised reported overlap 34%→43% while readability stayed perfect — pure bbox artifact.
proposal: VP-14 should compare actual rendered text-ink extents (account for text-align: left label run ends well before right-aligned number run begins) or whitelist same-row adjacent grid cells where ink ranges do not overlap. Do NOT shrink the table to satisfy it (would distort genuine design / risk recall).

symptom:
CSS grid/flex-column 셀 안의

및 중앙정렬(text-align:center+align-items:center) nested-flex 안의

가 컬럼별 x를 못 잡고 좌측/중앙 x로 collapse → 형제 컬럼들의 동일타입 요소가 한 지점에 겹침. 태그/일반 div는 정상. 진단법: h3->div, p->div 교체 시 완전 해소(재렌더 실증). 디자인측 회피 가능하나 의도대로면 정상 마크업이 깨지는 converter 결함
proposal: html2pptx 의 BLOCK_CHILD 위치측정에서 (a) heading 태그(h1~h6) 및 (b) align-items:center 컬럼 내부 텍스트노드의 getBoundingClientRect x 좌표가 부모/형제 기준으로 잘못 누적되는지 점검. recall 영향 없음(렌더 위치 결함, 룰 과탐 아님). 글로벌 직접수정은 메인 합의 후
